trending_videos.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

trending_videos.title: First Round: South Florida vs. Louisville
trending_videos.description: No. 6 Cardinals and No. 11 Bulls tip off in a first-round clash of the NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament. The Cardinals rely on their perimeter shooting to set the pace, while the Bulls seek to control the glass. The winner advances to the next round.

trending_videos.title: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
trending_videos.description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer FRAME BY FRAME Breakdown & Analysis by New Rockstars’ Erik Voss! Get 10% off your first month of therapy at https://betterhelp.com/NewRockstars. #spiderman #spidermanbrandnewday #trailer  #sponsored

Here is EVERYTHING you missed in the trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day (2026) - every clue for the MUTANTS, Jean Grey, even ROGUE?? What was removed from this trailer? Will Daredevil appear in this movie? Will Norman Osborn? Will Bruce Banner’s “savage” Hulk form? How will this movie set up Avengers Doomsday and Secret Wars? Erik Voss breaks down this trailer frame by frame for every callback to Andrew Garfield Spider-Man and Tobey Maguire Spider-Man and why these callbacks are so important to what’s really happening to Tom Holland Peter Parker in this movie!

We're back at the UCB Theater in Los Angeles on April 17th, come in person or stream anywhere. Tickets: https://ucbcomedy.com/show/new-rockstars-live-its-morbin-time

NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK
youtube.

trending_videos.title: First Round: Troy vs. Nebraska
trending_videos.description: The No. 4 Nebraska Cornhuskers and the No. 13 Troy Trojans face off in the first round of the 2026 NCAA Tournament. This South Region matchup takes place at the Paycom Center in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. The winner will advance to the Round of 32.

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

trending_videos.title: The Five
trending_videos.description: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

trending_videos.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

trending_videos.title: Valspar Championship, First Round
trending_videos.description: From Innisbrook Resort Copperhead Course in Palm Harbor, Fla.

trending_videos.title: Cryo Archive Launch Trailer | Marathon
trending_videos.description:
//: ALL NODES RESOLVED 
//: UESC MARATHON ACCESS: INITIATED 
|| countdown engaged 
|| the marathon is waking 

The final ARG puzzle has been resolved in a massive community effort orchestrated by #breach-protocol in the official Marathon Discord. 

But this isn’t the end. Aboard the Marathon, you’ll face labyrinthian corridors, raid-like puzzles, and seven frozen Vaults leading to an entity even the UESC fears. 
 
The Marathon is waking. Prepare. Coming March 20, 2026. 

Purchase Marathon now:
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

trending_videos.title: First Round: High Point vs. Wisconsin
trending_videos.description: No. 5 Badgers and No. 12 Panthers compete in an opening-round game of the NCAA Men's Tournament. This neutral-site event features two fast-paced offenses fighting for survival. Both squads aim to secure a vital win to keep their title hopes alive.

examples: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
Sonic the Hedgehog 4 | Title Reveal (2027 Movie) - Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz, Kristen Bell
Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
movie_trailers.insights: Movie trailers remain a significant trend on YouTube, leveraging anticipation and fan engagement. They account for 30% of the trending videos, indicating strong viewer interest in upcoming films.

examples: First Round: South Florida vs. Louisville
First Round: High Point vs. Wisconsin
sports_events.insights: Sports content, particularly live or highlight coverage of events, maintains a robust presence, representing 40% of the trending content. This indicates a consistent demand for sports-related videos, especially during key tournament phases.

examples: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
breakdown_and_analysis.insights: In-depth analysis videos, particularly those breaking down popular trailers or events, attract niche audiences interested in detailed content consumption. This suggests a market for content that provides value beyond the primary source material.

gaming.insights: Gaming content, though less frequent in this dataset, shows potential for growth, especially when tied to new releases or updates. Engaging trailers for game launches can captivate both gaming enthusiasts and broader audiences.

news_and_talk_shows.insights: News and talk shows continue to hold relevance, appealing to audiences seeking current affairs and entertainment commentary. This content type may benefit from increased engagement through timely topics.

diverse_sources.insights: The diversity of channels producing trending content suggests a broad range of interests among YouTube audiences. Channels with established brand recognition, such as PlayStation and Paramount Pictures, leverage their existing fan base to drive viewership.

single_video_contributors.insights: Each of the top channels contributed only one video to the trending list, indicating that even singular content pieces can achieve significant traction if aligned with current audience interests and trends.

increased_collaborations.insights: Collaborations between well-known brands and influencers or analysts (e.g., movie breakdowns) could enhance visibility and tap into diverse audience bases, offering a way to expand reach and engagement.

expansion_of_sports_content.insights: Given the strong performance of sports-related videos, there is potential to expand content offerings in this domain, such as behind-the-scenes footage, athlete interviews, or interactive fan experiences.

leveraging_niche_communities.insights: Creators can capitalize on niche interests, such as detailed analysis and breakdowns, to build loyal audiences that value depth over breadth, potentially enhancing viewer retention and engagement.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
